features.title: Authorization failure projection parity
features.description: Project authentication and authorization failures consistently across REST and JSON-RPC for equivalent canonical outcomes.

features.title: AuthN provider missing-credential status projection
features.description: Track the integration defect in test_authn_unauthorized_errors: routes protected through AuthNProvider via app.set_auth must project missing bearer credentials consistently with the REST authn provider contract; current runtime returns 401 where the governed test expects 403. Related surfaces include auth-failure projection parity and anonymous-access REST status parity.
